metadata.description: The bottega workshop — autonomous long-running agent runs with signed acceptance, distributed as a single installable plugin.

plugins.name: bottega
plugins.description: Four entry points — /bottega:run (spec then execute), /bottega:spec (sign without running), /bottega:execute (run a signed spec), /bottega:patch (the small job, no spec): the maestro signs a spec with the user — or auto-signs from an issue with --unattended — then runs build -> review -> QA -> verify autonomously and delivers a PR with evidence.
